text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru runs over to me, beaming
enthusiastically!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Reverse fortune-telling time! The hour has finally
dawned upon us, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm usually the one doing the fortune-telling,
right? But this time around, I bring an opportunity
so incredible it's going to blow your mind!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I want you to tell my future.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Please, do me the honor! How do you think my
race this afternoon will turn out?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Predicting the future is not in my repertoire, but
before I can say anything...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I think...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I had a vision of Fukukitaru's future...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I jump as a voice practically materializes next to
us.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Oh, Manhattan Cafe!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ever enigmatic and mysterious... Do you walk the
boundary between this world and the next even
now?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And did you just say you had a vision? And that
vision was about my future?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Um... Well, sort of...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You appeared in my dream last night...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I did?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, what did you see? Surely a dream from
someone as mysterious as yourself will proffer
some sort of clue for me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whatever it is, I'd love to hear it!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Well, we were at today's scrimmage... and you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have a bad feeling about this. I take Manhattan
Cafe aside to speak to her in private.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Fukukitaru came in last place in my dream...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She was swallowed up by a mysterious shadow
chasing her from behind...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I knew it'd be bad... How should we break the
news to her?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Traineeer. Cafeee. You can't just keep all
the deets to yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Fill me in! What happened to me in your dream?
choice_data_list: You blew the competition out of the water.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wh-what did you just say?! Is that true, Cafe?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I finished dead last?! As in I didn't even stand a
chance?! Not even a chance of... chance of... the
chupacabra?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yes... you were trapped by a black shadow... It
caught you from behind...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ain'tnoway! But considering it's your dream, there must be some truth to it...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If I get caught by the chupacabra, it's over for
me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, at the scrimmage...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Outta my way! No way I'm letting myself get
gobbled up!

text_block_list.name: Leading Racer
text_block_list.text:
H-huh?! Fukukitaru?! What's got you so
flustered...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You better run fast, or you'll get eaten by the
chupacabra too! That blood-sucking fiend!

text_block_list.name: Leading Racer
text_block_list.text: What?! What are you talking about?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's starting to put pressure on the runner in the
lead. It looks like her anxiety is giving her a
boost.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I won?! And not only that, I blew everyone out of
the water?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Great fortune must be coming my way,
Cafe-guaranteed!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case, I don't see any reason not to go
wild. I have nothing to be scared of anymore!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Heave-ho, pull in the victory haul!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ended up lying to her, but Matikanefukukitaru's
complete faith in the omen empowers her to
secure a huge victory.
